event_info: runs straightaway for Sanju. Lovely touch. Gets the width outside off; Samson hangs on the back foot and guides it wide of backward point. There is no protection in the deep and Sanju gets his first boundary
there you go. Sanju gets going with back-to-back boundaries. Poor delivery from Vaibhav Arora. Short and wide outside off. Samson rocks on the back foot and cuts it through point. Raced away

make that hat-trick of fours. Not the way Samson would like; but he will still take it. This one bounced a tad extra outside off. Samson gets a thick edge that flies over the slip. Couple of bounces and into the third man fence
good length delivery outside off; Samson taps it to deep point and gets to the other end
not much swing on offer for the pacer. Vaibhav Arora hits the good length outside off; Gaikwad drops it to point and gets off the mark with a single
in the channel outside off; Samson gets behind the line of the ball and defends it to mid-off
sprayed well down leg. The keeper can't hang onto the ball despite the dive to his left. Batters cross over for an extra run
fullish in length outside off; Samson square drives it to deep point
edged and just past Varun at short third man. Hint of shape away from the right-hander. Gaikwad reaches out for the ball and gets a thick edge on the drive. Flies to the left of diving fielder
half-volley outside off; driven down to mid-off. The fielder dives to his right and keeps it down to a single
Green attacks the stumps with a full delivery. Samson tucks it straight to short mid-wicket
1 run; drops in short at the body. Samson fails to get bat on the pull. The ball rolls to the on-side of the thigh pad for a leg bye
good length delivery swinging away on middle. Gaikwad clips it in front of short mid-wicket for a quick single
Anukul starts with a wide. New ball slides down from leg-stump. Past Gaikwad's pads. Wided
hint of turn outside off; Gaikwad chops the cut to backward point

ball_event: out Caught by Rovman Powell!! Another disappointing knock from the CSK skipper. Looks to go big with the slog sweep. The ball is too full to get any elevation. Gaikwad reaches out for the ball and picks Powell at deep mid-wicket
event_info: who runs to his right and takes a good catch. He picks the only fielder on the on-side. Ruturaj Gaikwad walks back nodding his head. Ruturaj Gaikwad c Rovman Powell b Anukul Roy 7(6) [4s-1]
flatter on middle; tucked to the on-side
quicker on the stumps; defended back to Anukul
arm-ball on the pads; Samson tucks it to vacant mid-wicket region
in the slot and Mhatre goes over the top. Clears his front foot and thumps it straight back over the bowler's head. Few bounces and over the fence for Mhatre's first boundary
little bit of shape outside off; Samson opens the bat face and steers it wide of deep point. They should have looked for two; instead the duo settle for a single
this was short and hurried Mhatre on the pull. Yet he manages to put it away. Flat bats it wide of mid-off and the ball races away for four
peach from Cameron Green. Gets it to shape away from middle stump and goes past the defence. Beats the outside edge and flies over off-stump by a whisker
width on offer outside off; Mhatre throws the kitchen sink at it. Doesn't bother to get close to the ball. Slashes hard and picks the gap on the off-side. Through cover-point for four more

wonderfully played. This is getting better and better for Mhatre. Fraction short on the pads; Mhatre hops across and pulls it high and handsome over deep square leg. Green followed Mhatre as he looked give himself some room

50 comes up in 4 overs for CSK. This is brilliant batting from the 19 year old. Makes room and clubs the short delivery in front of square. The white ball flies under the light and goes past the fence comfortably. 21 runs coming of that over from Green

CSK are on a roll here. Three sixes in a row. Two for Mhatre and one for Samson. Flighted on middle; Samson gets under the ball and smokes it straight back over the sightscreen for his first maximum off the night
tucked to the on-side for a single
Mhatre presses forward and defends it to the on-side
flatter on off; defended back to Anukul Roy
looks to flat bat the skidder outside off; the ball sneaks under the bat and goes through to the keeper
angled in from round the wicket. Mhatre clips it to deep mid-wicket
not a great start for Vaibhav in his second spell. Runs in and bowls a high full toss on the pads. Mhatre heaves it to mid-wicket and picks four
back-to-back fours again for Mhatre. Half-volley outside off; Mhatre clears his front foot and drills it past mid-off. Not a single fielder moved as it was hit with power
Mhatre isn't stopping today. The onslaught continues. Was short on middle; Mhatre goes on the front foot and pulls it straight back over the bowler's head. 4;4;4 off Vaibhav over so far
banged in short on middle; Mhatre goes for the pull and misses. Was a long way above his head
another quick shortish length delivery from Vaibhav. Mhatre mistimes the heave to mid-on

ball_event: out Caught by Ramandeep Singh!! Vaibhav Arora has the last laugh. He picks Mhatre with a short delivery. He saw Mhatre not so comfortable with the short delivery and persisted with it. Mhatre goes for the pull. The ball was always getting big on him
event_info: yet he goes through with the shot. The ball picks up a lot of elevation rather than distance. Ramandeep at deep mid-wicket settles under the ball and takes a good catch just inside the boundary. Ayush Mhatre c Ramandeep Singh b Vaibhav Arora 38(17) [4s-6 6s-2]
flighted delivery on off; Sanju drops it in front of cover and looks to get a quick single. His partner sends him back in time
shortish outside off; cut to point
Samson jumps on the back foot and punches it down to long-off
back of a length delivery outside off; Brevis goes on the back foot and cuts it to sweeper cover
angled across the right-hander; punched down to long-off

flights it and goes fuller in length. Brevis' eyes lit up and he goes for the big shot. For a moment he had his heart his mouth as he didn't time it as well as he would have liked it. Just about clears long-on; who jumps and tries to pull back in
flatter on middle and leg; Samson makes room and tucks it to the on-side
96.3ks delivery outside off; comes in a tad. Brevis defends it to point
this one is even quicker. Bowled at 108.6ks on middle; Brevis bunts it down to long-on
Varun Chakaravarthy offers width to Samson. He slashes hard and gets a thick edge that flies over backward point
Samson goes for the pull. His bat went further than the ball. Lot of sweat on probably; his bat comes off the hand and flies to mid-wicket. The ball manages to roll to the on-side for a single
angled into the pads at 110.4ks. Brevis tucks it to deep square leg

in this air and falls at no man's land. Four fielders were trying to get to the ball; yet no one could get close. Covers fielder was the closest; who dives; but can't get his hand. Brevis gets a leading edge trying to go over the top. He got in a tangle trying to go over the leg-side. The ball falls over the bowler's head
round the wicket on middle; defended to the right of Narine
Samson tucks it to square leg and gets to the other end
spins away outside off; Brevis rocks back and cuts it to sweeper cover
good length delivery on off; driven down to long-off
Brevis goes straight down the ground. Tries to get under the ball; but only manages to get it off the toe end. Rinku at long-on runs across and collects it one bounce
yorker that sneaks under the bat. Brevis gets beaten
another play and a miss. This was bowled at 148.8ks on a good length from Kartik Tyagi outside off. Brevis gets beaten on the outside edge through to the keeper
short delivery at the body. This was at 142.4ks. Brevis manages to keep it away with a half hearted pull to square leg
pace and bounce from Kartik Tyagi. This is an excellent over from Tyagi so far. Short and wide outside off; Samson gets beaten for bounce. The ball flies over the bat
Samson sits on the back foot and latches out on the short delivery outside off. Slashed over point for a flat six
goes wide again; this time with a slower delivery. Samson had to wait and cuts it to sweeper cover
flatter on the stumps; Samson pushes it back to the bowler
tossed up on middle; Samson pushes it back to the bowler; he's bowling from round the wicket
he's mixing the pace well; floated up on middle; Samson goes for the wild sweep; but the ball goes off the inside edge to backward square leg
flatter outside off; Brevis plays it away to sweeper cover
slightly shorter and flatter; Samson pulls it away to deep mid-wicket; nice over so far from Chakaravarthy
pushed through quicker; it was pitched outside leg; Brevis misses out on the flick
he's smashed it over long off; remarkable shot from Samson; it was a back of a length slower delivery; Samson was hanging back in the crease; picks it and smashes it over long off

ball_event: out Bowled!! What a comeback from the youngster
event_info: this was on a length; but it tailed in with an extra pace; Samson's feet didn't move much as he went for a wild slog; he connects thin air as the ball rattles into the stumps; the in-form Samson departs. Sanju Samson b Kartik Tyagi 48(32) [4s-4 6s-3]
he gets off the mark with a boundary; full and wide outside off; Khan gets under the ball nicely and slices it past the fielder to deep point; he picked the gap to perfection
on a length and outside off; Khan plays it to the off side
speared in full outside off; Khan mistimes a drive to long-on
smashed down the ground; but only a couple; over pitched on off; Brevis drills it down to long-off; the fielder ran in quickly and cuts it off
slightly shorter outside off and turning away; Khan pushes it to covers and sets off for a single; but sent back
1 run; turning in sharply; Khan played across the line and the ball goes off the inside edge to short third man
Brevis makes room to the leg side; but Narine bowls it flatter; Brevis just pushes it to point for a single
short and turning away; Khan guides it to short third man
huge appeal for an LBW; but that was going down; quicker and fuller; Khan gets down to play his favourite sweep shot; but missed it completely
turning in from outside off; Khan gets down and sweeps it to deep mid-wicket; just a single
the spinners are doing very well today; once again Khan attempts the sweep shot and can't connect it
he's got hold of it this time; tossed up and outside off; Khan picks it and sends it packing over long on; Chakaravarthy just missed his length and Khan takes full toll of it
flatter and shorter; Khan pulls it to long-on
hammered away; he drags it down outside off; Brevis had ample time to free his arms and he smashes it to deep extra cover
another one; flatter outside off; pushed through quicker; Brevis was hanging back in the crease and late-cuts it to third man; that's clever batting
quicker on middle; Brevis plays it to the onside
flatter wide outside off stump
he's not getting the sweep shot right tonight; drifting in from outside off; Khan gets down to sweep; but the ball goes off the toe end to mid-on
fuller and quicker outside off; Brevis had moved across to the leg side and leaves it; clever thinking from the bowler
bowls it much wider outside off; wide given
flatter and quicker; Brevis goes back and pushes it to the off side
bowls it wide outside off and turning away; he's bowling it wide as Brevis is backing away
Brevis had backed away to the legside; Roy bowls it wide outside off; Brevis had to reach out for it as he plays it to long-off
really good over from Roy; flatter outside off; Khan guides it to short third and sets off for a single; sent back
tossed up outside off and slower through the air; Khan is beaten by the flight and lofts it to sweeper cover; luckily it fell in no man's land
banged in short and targeting the body; the ball hurried onto him as Khan goes for the pull shot; the ball goes off the outer half of the bat to third man
top edge and it goes the distance; the fine leg was up in the circle; banged in short; Brevis goes for the pull and the ball flies off the top edge and sailed into the stands
fuller just outside off; Brevis drills it down to long-off
nice clean hit; it was bowled in the slot; length outside off; Khan just hung back and plays the pick up shot to perfection as the ball sailed over backward square leg
round the wicket now; bowls it on a length wide outside off; Khan had to reach out for it as he slaps it to mid-off
wide given; it was angled across; close to the wide line as he Brevis leaves it alone; he has to bowl it again. Good review from Brevis

the extra ball has costed them; back of a length and angling across; Brevis just smashes it past the fielder between mid-wicket and long-on; brutal power; the partnership between Dewald Brevis and Sarfaraz Khan is now 51

excellent bowling from Narine today; tossed up and outside off; the knuckle ball; Sarfaraz goes for an almighty heave and misses it as the ball turned away to crash into the stumps. Sarfaraz Khan b Sunil Narine 23(18) [4s-1 6s-2]
2 runs; sliding into the pads; Dube misses out on the flick as the ball clips the pads on the way to fine leg
flatter outside off; Dube hangs back and punches it to long-on
beautiful bowling from Narine; slower on middle and turning away; Brevis was completely foxed by the delivery as the ball hits him high on the pads
he's put it away; Brevis had backed away to the leg side; Narine bowls it flatter and shorter outside off; Brevis slaps it to deep extra cover; Narine is lived with himself for giving him width
slightly shorter outside off; Brevis punches it to extra cover
full and angled across; Dube drives it to extra cover; a shy at the non-strikers end; but it was off target
he's missed out on this one; a juicy full-toss outside off; Brevis mistimes it straight to the fielder at covers
full and wide way outside off; he's to bowl again

ball_event: out Caught by Vaibhav Arora!! The wide line has worked
event_info: clever bowling from Tyagi; slower and wider outside off; Brevis goes for the wild swipe; was beaten by the pace and manages to edge it towards short third; where Vaibhav takes it inches from the ground as the ball was dying on him. Dewald Brevis c Vaibhav Arora b Kartik Tyagi 41(29) [4s-4 6s-2]
full and wide; just inside the wide line; Overton leaves it alone and they don't go for the review
he's put it away; slower and shorter outside off; Overton had ample time to stay in the crease and smashes it to deep backward point
he can't connect this time; excellent death bowling from Tyagi; just 6 off it; another slower delivery outside off; Overton was early into the shot and misses it completely
full and wide outside off; just close to the wide line; in fact it went on the line; the umpire has to reverse his decision; good review from KKR
full and outside off; Dube smashes it straight down the track and it hits the stumps at the non striker's end
slower and shorter way outside off; another wide
he's helped it nicely; banged in slower and shorter; Dube waits for it and pulls it over the fielder to backward square leg; he palyed it late and found the gap
wide yorker outside off; no room for Dube as he digs it to the off side
oh another widish yorker way outside off; Dube leaves it alone
another one; he's under pressure; full and wide outside off stump
finally he's bowled a legal delivery; full-toss outside off; Dube drills it to long-off; can't find the gap
comes from round the wicket and bowls a widish yorker outside off; no room for Overton as he jams it down to long-off; just 9 runs off it considering he bowled many wides in the over
full and wide outside off; no width; Overton slices it to sweeper cover
he's bowling well here; giving nothing away; full and on middle; Dube drills it down to long-on and they run well for the second
slower short delivery; Dube was early into the shot and mistimes a pull to square leg; the fielder threw the ball back to the bowler as he misses the direct hit and they get an extra run
speared in full; Dube drives it down to long-off
pacy full-toss; Overton drives it to deep extra cover; can't find the gap as he was looking for the second run
pace again; well bowled Tyagi; full-toss outside off; Dube still can't time it as he hits it to sweeper cover
Khaleel starts with a poor line; but no harm done. Allen misses the tuck and the ball rolls down to fine leg for a leg-bye
Narine wants to go big straightaway. Clears his front foot and looks to tonk it over mid-off. Misses the ball by a long way
another play and a miss. Shorter this time just outside off; Narine looks to slog and misses. Wasn't far away from knocking the off-stump
full and swinging away from Khaleel. Narine is a long way outside the line and lets it go
Narine was looking for this from ball one. Gets the line and length he needs. Short on middle; Narine stands tall and pulls it over mid-wicket for the first maximum
good length delivery outside off; Narine looks to slash and misses
swing on offer for Kamboj. Outswinger outside off; Allen gets a thick inside edge on the drive to deep mid-wicket
Narine has got that fine. Probably came off the glove. The line was down leg; Narine gets inside the line of the ball and pulls it fine for four. Short fine had no chance
full and swinging in on middle and leg; Narine digs it out to mid-on

ball_event: out Caught by Shivam Dube!! That's up in the air and its the big wicket of Finn Allen. CSK needed this breakthrough early on and they get it. The crowd erupts. Coming to the ball
event_info: it was full and Kamboj got it to swing away from the right-hander. Allen walks across and looks to slog it on the on-side. Plays it against the line and gets a leading edge that goes to Dube at cover-point. Finn Allen c Shivam Dube b Anshul Kamboj 1(3)
fullish length delivery on off; driven straight to mid-off
Rahane drops it to point and sets off for a quick single
angling across the right-hander; Rahane chops the cut to cover-point
half-volley outside off; Rahane drives it to mid-off

slashed hard from Rahane. Was short and wide outside off; Rahane cuts it to the right of deep point. The ball bounces just in front of the fielder at a good height; who stops it cleanly and keeps it down to a single
Narine keeps going at the other end. Sits deep in the crease and goes through with the shot. Was on a length on middle; Narine thumps it wide of long-on. Just clears the fielder's reach
Khaleel comes round the wicket and angles it away from Narine. He goes for the pull and misses
good length delivery on off; pushed in front of mid-off for a quick single
angling away past the left-hander; Narine is nowhere close to the ball as he makes room to heave it on the on-side

CSK skipper has dropped a sitter at mid-off. This was an attempted yorker on middle. Narine looks to go over mid-off. Gets it off the toe end and lobs straight to Ruturaj; who drops a sitter. Sanju can't believe that the catch falls to ground
swinging across the left-hander; Narine swings hard and misses
short on middle; Narine drags the pull wide of cow corner. The fielder in the deep had no chance of stopping that
this time Narine has no room to extend his arms. Was short at his body. Narine mistimes the pull to deep square leg
fullish outside off; driven uppishly to mid-off. The ball goes on the bounce to the fielder
wild slog across the line to a length delivery angling into the right-hander from round the wicket; the thick inside-edge goes on to the back leg; rolls to the left of Khaleel Ahmed; they take one

ball_event: out Caught by Gurjapneet Singh!! Contrasting emotions in both camps. Fleming uncharacteristically is excited while Abhishek Nayar is glum. The angle from round the wicket works. It's full and outside the leg-stump
event_info: cramps Sunil Narine who has made room to flick; the thick leading-edge loops to short third man and Gurjanpeet is happy to accept it with glee. Narine never got going despite the two sixes and falls inside the powerplay. Sunil Narine c Gurjapneet Singh b Khaleel Ahmed 24(17) [4s-2 6s-2]
full outside off; Angkrish Raghuvanshi gets forward to drive and he opens the face of the bat; finds short third man. Raghuvanshi is sent back by Ajinkya Rahane in time
full and outside off; Angkrish Raghuvanshi comes down the track to loft; off the bottom of the bat and it doesn't carry to Gaikwad at mid-off. On the bounce
short of length outside off; Angkrish Raghuvanshi waits and cuts the off-pace delivery to deep point
slower-ball and the off-cutter and full outside off; Ajinkya Rahane gets forward and opens the face of the bat to drive to sweeper cover
flat back of a length on middle; sort of grips in the surface; Ajinkya Rahane goes on the back foot and mistimes the pull to deep mid-wicket; they are happy with one
Angkrish Raghuvanshi backs away; flat good length on middle; he cuts and finds the fielder at extra-cover

flat good length and Angkrish Raghuvanshi is struck just outside off; as he misses the sweep. Sanju Samson goes aaahhhhhhhhhhh in appeal. More of screaming than anything else. Comical appeal that. It's a flat delivery and skids on straight; Raghuvanshi misses and is hit on the back leg; but he ensured he got outside off. The ump got that right. CSK don't review
good shot. Angkrish Raghuvanshi backs away outside the leg-stump; this is a good length delivery and a hint of turn away; he cuts well and beats the dive of Kamboj at cover-point who went to his left
flat good length on leg-stump; Angkrish Raghuvanshi makes room and cuts; but picks out Kamboj at cover-point; straight to the fielder
the one-finger seam-up delivery and it swings in like an inswinger to leg-stump; Angkrish Raghuvanshi backs away slightly; drives it straight back to Akeal Hosein. Played with a high-elbow
flat good length on off; Ajinkya Rahane goes on the back foot and pulls to deep mid-wicket; just one
attacks the stumps on middle; Angkrish Raghuvanshi goes on the back foot and punches after making room; wide of cover
the googly and wide outside off; turns away; Ajinkya Rahane reaches for it and mistimes the cut to backward point for one
good reverse-sweep. The googly again; turns away; from off; Angkrish Raghuvanshi with premeditation; turns around and reverse-sweeps; gets it over Khaleel at short third man
again premeditation. Angkrish Raghuvanshi down so early for the sweep; flat good length and well outside off; swept to deep mid-wicket
full outside the leg-stump; Angkrish Raghuvanshi gets forward and flicks to deep square-leg; they take on Kamboj and come back for the 2nd
the one-finger inswinger and it cramps Angkrish Raghuvanshi on leg-stump; he backs away and punches it through vacant point
tossed up full outside off; from wide of the crease; Ajinkya Rahane gets forward to slog; thick inside-edge goes to deep mid-wicket

dropped and it's gone for six. Brevis the man at long-on. He was on the run. And it was not an easy catch as well. Angkrish Raghuvanshi goes on the back foot to pull; was a back of a length delivery and he miscues it; Brevis on the run to his right; gets two hands; it hits them hard and due to that; it goes over the fence. Was he put off by Sarfaraz coming near him from deep mid-wicket?
flat good length and sliding into leg-stump; Angkrish Raghuvanshi goes on the back foot and pulls hard; wide of deep mid-wicket and it's two more
good length and cramps Angkrish Raghuvanshi on off; he backs away and cuts hard and straight to deep point
flat good length on off; Ajinkya Rahane gets forward and closes the face of the bat to flick to backward square-leg
starts with a wide down leg; Ajinkya Rahane goes on the back foot to pull and misses; Sanju Samson does well as he dives to his left to collect; saves runs

Ajinkya Rahane gets going with this one. It's a clever shot. Premeditation as short fine was inside the ring. It's a length delivery outside off; Rahane gets low and scoops all the way for six over short fine
a slower-ball and on a short of length outside off; Ajinkya Rahane gets forward and then dabs with an open-face to backward point. Sanju Samson applauds that delivery from Gurjapneet Singh

beautiful shot. Ajinkya Rahane breaking the shackles. It's a short of length delivery on middle; thigh-high; Rahane goes on the back foot and pulls; has the elevation to clear deep square-leg. Hint of a top-edge in that and that helped Rahane
a slower-ball on a good length on leg-stump; Ajinkya Rahane gets forward and closes the face of the bat to glance it to short fine

nice shot. Big over this. A short of length delivery on off; Angkrish Raghuvanshi makes room slightly and uses the pace on that delivery to guide it between backward point and short third man. No fuss; just clever batting
short of length and tight on middle; Angkrish Raghuvanshi drops and runs in front of cover
full on leg-stump; Angkrish Raghuvanshi gets forward to defend; the ball hits the leg and rolls in front of backward point for one

now Sarfaraz drops it from deep mid-wicket. He was charging in and perhaps too quickly for his own good. Gets both hands and drops it. Similar to Brevis' earlier. Hard hands and down it goes. It's a flat good length on off; Ajinkya Rahane tries to swipe across the line; the top-edge flies high and Sarfaraz did all the hard work by running in; but then fails to hang on

ball_event: out Caught by Dewald Brevis!! Finally Akeal Hosein gets a wicket. After two drops. Angkrish Raghuvanshi fails to cash in on the earlier drop. It's a flat length delivery on leg-stump
event_info: he goes on the back foot and makes room slightly; pulls but there's no power or timing behind that hit. Easy catch for long-on and Brevis reverse-cups with ease. CSK tightening the screws here. Angkrish Raghuvanshi c Dewald Brevis b Akeal Hosein 27(19) [4s-3 6s-1]
down leg; turning in; Rinku Singh goes on the back foot to glance and looks like he got a bit of an inside-edge on to thigh pad; finds short fine
good length and flat on leg-stump; Rinku Singh gets forward and nudges it down to long-on to get off the mark
good length on off; Ajinkya Rahane gets forward and calmly nudges one to the vacant mid-wicket area to retain the strike
googly and flat outside off; good length; Ajinkya Rahane gets forward and opens the face of the bat to punch to sweeper cover
flat good length outside off; Rinku Singh goes on the back foot and makes room to punch to deep point
tossed up full on leg-stump; Ajinkya Rahane gets forward to drive to long-on
tossed up full outside off; Rinku Singh gets forward to drive it straight down the ground; past the left boot of Noor Ahmad who tried to stop it

ball_event: out Caught by Ruturaj Gaikwad!! Noor Ahmad celebrates by closing his eyes with both hands. KKR fans are downcast. It's tossed up full on middle
event_info: Ajinkya Rahane gets forward to loft over extra-cover; inside-out; but he miscues it and that's a simple catch for Rutu who's has gone a few paces outside the 30-yard mark at extra-cover. The bat turned on impact and that's why Rahane miscued that. 50th IPL wicket for Noor. Ajinkya Rahane c Ruturaj Gaikwad b Noor Ahmad 28(22) [6s-2]

ball_event: out Bowled!! Two in two and the Chepauk crowd are jumping up and down with whistles tooting in their lips. This is bowled from round the wicket. Noor Ahmad changed the angle and pushed it through quicker on middle and leg
event_info: good length and Cameron Green backs away to access the off-side; the ball rushes through and misses the bat; falls on the stumps. Green disappoints once again this season with the bat. CSK well on top here. Noor leaps and punches the air as he celebrates. Cameron Green b Noor Ahmad 0(1)
flat good length on leg-stump; skids on; Rinku Singh goes on the back foot and pulls to deep backward square-leg; more of a short-arm jab
tossed up full on leg-stump as a slip waits. Rovman Powell gets forward to flick to the vacant mid-wicket area
flat good length and across Rinku Singh outside off; he goes on the back foot and cuts to deep point
tossed up full on leg-stump; Rovman Powell gets forward to defend to the right of Akeal Hosein
wide of the crease and flat on middle; good length and Rovman Powell goes on the back foot and nudges it down to long-on
good length on off; Rinku Singh backs away as he goes on the back foot and punches wide of deep point. Rovman Powell is happy with one
the hat-trick ball is one which is down leg; good length and Rinku Singh goes on the back foot to glance straight to the fielder at short fine
flat good length outside off; Rinku Singh goes on the back foot and cuts to the left of cover-point. Sarfaraz prevents any runs
Rinku Singh has missed out. This is a delivery down leg; short; he goes on the back foot and pulls; but mistimes it to short fine. That was a boundary ball
four dots in a row. It's flat good length delivery on off; hurries Rinku Singh who goes on the back foot and pushes it to point. No run there

ball_event: out Caught by Shivam Dube!! The pressure of the dots. And it has taken Rinku Singh's wicket. He was visibly disappointed with Rovman Powell for not running off the last ball. He felt there was one to point
event_info: and next ball he holes out. He backs away and this is full on the stumps; looks to loft; off the thick inside half of the bat and Dube at long-on didn't have to move an inch. Easy catch and this is going from bad to worse for KKR. The camera pans to Abhishek Nayar and Rahane who are seated next to each other. Understandably they are gutted. Powell nervously looked in the direction of long-on as soon as Rinku hit that. Watches Dube catch that. Rinku Singh c Shivam Dube b Noor Ahmad 6(12)
flat good length outside off; Ramandeep Singh goes on the back foot and punches it down to sweeper cover; is off the mark

fiery bouncer and this has gone close to the gloves and bat. This is at Ramandeep Singh; who hooks and misses. CSK review. They feel there's something on this. UltraEdge throws a flat line. CSK lose the review. It was close to the glove but a flat line
slower-ball and on a short of length just outside off; Ramandeep Singh goes on the back foot and closes the face of the bat to nudge it to backward square-leg; turns the strike over
hard back of a length on off; Rovman Powell goes on the back foot to defend and it's to the vacant mid-wicket area
short and off-pace outside off; Ramandeep Singh shuffles across and pulls to fine-leg. Didn't time it

full outside off and what a shot. And such an effortless hit too. Rovman Powell gets forward and leans into the loft; and the ball has flown over the sweeper cover fence. 10 rows back. Even Ruturaj can only open his mouth and gape in amazement as he watches the ball's flight
full on off; Rovman Powell gets forward to defend to backward point; off the open-face
flat good length outside off; Rovman Powell goes on the back foot and cuts hard; just one as sweeper cover gets across and cuts it off to his left
the googly; on a good length on off; Rovman Powell goes on the back foot and taps to the right of backward point; quick single taken
flat back of a length outside off; Ramandeep Singh goes on the back foot and cuts to sweeper cover
tossed up full on leg-stump; Rovman Powell gets forward and flicks to deep mid-wicket. He is happy to turn the strike over
1 run; Ramandeep Singh backs away; Noor Ahmad follows him with a length delivery; Ramandeep flicks and misses; a legbye to short fine
Rovman Powell runs hard and comes back for two. He flicks this leg-stump delivery to deep backward square-leg and races hard; beats the throw on the bounce to Sanju Samson. That was good running
short of length on off; Ramandeep Singh shuffles across to help the ball on its way; cross-seam; takes it on his thigh
slower-ball and cross-seam; short of length outside off; Ramandeep Singh leans back; upper-cuts and gets an easy boundary to the deep point fence. Over backward point

that's what Ramandeep Singh wanted to do off the first delivery of the over. It's a short of length delivery and just outside off; cross-seam; Ramandeep shuffles across and short-arm jabs that high and over the deep mid-wicket fence
the slower-ball and short. But too high. Ramandeep Singh watches it over his head and takes the wide
short of length and hard into the pitch outside off; Ramandeep Singh goes on the back foot and dabs to backward point; wants a run; but Rovman Powell sends him back
slower-ball off-cutter and grips and turns like an off-break; towards off; Ramandeep Singh goes on the back foot and dabs to the left of short third man
short of length on middle; seam-up; Rovman Powell goes on the back foot and nudges it to the deep mid-wicket fence. Powell retains the strike with that run
slower-ball and short of length on off; Rovman Powell goes on the back foot and tucks to deep mid-wicket
slower-ball and short of length outside off; well wide; Ramandeep Singh goes on the back foot and cuts to sweeper cover
smashed. A slower-ball and wide outside off; on a length; Rovman Powell gets forward and blasts that so hard; over extra-cover; one bounce over the ropes. That flew off the bat
good comeback. A yorker length delivery on leg-stump; dug out to the right of Khaleel Ahmed who gets across and cuts it off
full and right up there; Rovman Powell gets forward to drill it hard and straight to long-on

slower-ball and short and wide outside off; Ramandeep Singh is on his tiptoes; he goes on the back foot and cuts up and over extra-cover. Runs away to the fence. Ramandeep did well as the ball took its time to come
full and down leg; from round the wicket. That typical Anshul Kamboj angle. Rovman Powell flicks and misses. Sanju Samson dives to his left and saves more runs

full and wide outside off; Rovman Powell loses his shape as he gets forward to drive; the thick inside-edge hits the pad and rolls to the right of Anshul Kamboj; he shies when Ramandeep Singh is well in. No backing up and then they take one
full on middle; Ramandeep Singh stays deep to heave; off the toe-end of the bat and to the vacant mid-wicket area. Just one
full and wide outside off; Rovman Powell throws the bat on that; slices it off a thick outside-edge and Noor at square third man does well to palm it back; saves three
yorker length outside off; Ramandeep Singh shuffles across and squeezes it to deep backward point. Just singles off this over
full on middle; Ramandeep Singh gets forward and whips it to deep backward square-leg. Just one
what an over this is. Just 7 runs off it. It's right up there in the blockhole. Ramandeep Singh can only dig it out to deep point
slower-ball and short into the pitch; Ramandeep Singh goes on the back foot and pulls to the left of deep backward square-leg for two. These runs won't hurt CSK
nicely done. A slower-ball off-cutter and short of length outside off; Ramandeep Singh opens the face of the bat and leans back; glides it over short third man. Used the field well
fine yorker length delivery on off; Ramandeep Singh goes deep; squeezes it out to backward point with an open-face
short on the stumps; pacy delivery and Rovman Powell is beaten for pace as he pulls and misses; flies over the top-edge
slower-ball and full outside off; inside the tramline; Rovman Powell loses all shape as he slogs to leg; misses. Reviews and the ball is inside the line
this is a slower-ball off-cutter and down leg; Rovman Powell pulls and misses; called a wide as Sanju Samson dives to his left to cut it off
short of length on middle; Rovman Powell goes on the back foot and pulls; to deep backward square-leg; Noor runs in and overruns the ball to his left; the spin beats him to his right. They take two

fine yorker. And Ramandeep Singh has squeezed it out. And gets it wide of deep backward point for four. Was outside off and Anshul Kamboj nailed it; but Ramandeep opens the face of the bat and gets it away
full and down leg; Ramandeep Singh flicks and misses; called a wide
low full-toss outside off; Ramandeep Singh gets forward to drive hard and straight to extra-cover. Overton is there

ball_event: out Caught by Sarfaraz Khan!! Sarfaraz dives to his left and takes a low catch at short third man and then shows off to the crowd. It's a low full-toss outside off
event_info: Ramandeep Singh premeditates the reverse-lap; doesn't find the gap. It was dying on Sarfaraz who took it well with both hands. Ramandeep Singh c Sarfaraz Khan b Anshul Kamboj 35(23) [4s-4 6s-1]
very full just outside off; Anukul Roy gets forward to drive to mid-off and Rutu is on the edge of the ring
low full-toss and down leg; Rovman Powell helps himself to a six. Effortlessly flicks this over deep backward square-leg. Too late though for KKR

Anshul Kamboj pumps his right-fist in delight. Rovman Powell has reviewed this for a non-wide. But he will lose it. This is full and wide but inside the tramline on the off-side; Powell gets forward to loft and misses. The ball is inside the tramline. Powell doing his best to extend this game. He wants some more action. Not sure the fans at Chepauk care. They are happy. CSK have won two games in a row
